plan_metadata.title: EAFIX Work-Cell Decomposition — Phase 3 & 4 Execution Plan
plan_metadata.tier_rationale: Phases 3 and 4 involve executable source mutations and routing rule production. Full pattern-first enforcement, worktree isolation, rollback plans, and all GATE-CFG-001 through GATE-CFG-006 are mandatory.

phase_descriptions.PH-03A: Pattern Bootstrap — create PATTERN_INDEX.yaml and all patterns required for refactoring. MUST complete before any PH-03B/C/D work begins.
phase_descriptions.PH-03B: Refactor Calendar Pipeline services (calendar-ingestor). Splits monolithic service into D2/D3/F2/D4 work-cell-scoped modules.
phase_descriptions.PH-03C: Refactor MT4 Bridge services (transport-router, EA executor). Splits into B1/B2/B3 work-cell-scoped modules.
phase_descriptions.PH-03D: Refactor remaining dense services (risk-manager, reentry-engine, gui-gateway). Splits into R1-R9, E1-E4, UI work cells.
phase_descriptions.PH-04A: Routing Rule Pattern Bootstrap — create PAT-ROUTING-RULE-AUTHOR and register EXEC-ROUTING-RULE-WRITER before any PH-04B work begins.
phase_descriptions.PH-04B: Author and validate AI routing rules (routing_rules.json) mapping natural language task keywords to work cell context.

required_artifacts_from_ph1_ph2: GATE-NOOVERRIDE-001 clean pass on all AUTHORITATIVE artifacts
prerequisite_check.required_baseline_state: Git working tree clean on base branch before PH-03A begins.

critical_constraint.name: NO_IMPLIED_BEHAVIOR
rules: Every executable step MUST declare pattern_id, executor_id, spec_file, config_schema_file before execution.
No source file may be refactored without a matching context_packet.json from Phase 2 defining its allowed_files.
Behavior may only be bound through registered executors plus approved spec/config/schema artifacts.
Ad hoc script creation where a registered pattern exists is forbidden.
Every planned source mutation MUST be pre-declared in artifact_intent_manifest.
Worktrees must be isolated: no PH-03B worktree may write into a PH-03C directory.
Protected paths must never be modified — enforcement is halt_and_rollback.
Pattern creation (PH-03A) MUST complete and all GATE-CFG-001 through GATE-CFG-006 MUST pass before any refactoring step begins.
Routing rules MUST be derived from submodule_context_catalog.json — no keyword or mapping invented without catalog backing.
step_id values are phase-scoped; global references use phase_step_key = {phase_id}/{step_id}.

notes: All paths in this plan use forward-slash notation; the executor normalizes to OS path separator at runtime.
Git commands are cross-platform via Git for Windows on Windows.
Avoid shell-specific pipe syntax in commands; use Python scripts for complex operations.

protected_paths.note: PATTERN_INDEX.yaml is protected once authored in PH-03A — it may only be extended by an approved PATTERN_CREATION step, never edited in-place by a refactoring or routing step.

run_artifact_policy.note: Refactored source files in services/ are the intended product, not run artifacts. Run artifacts (logs, evidence, diffs, patches) must stay under .state/.

execution_baseline.description: Capture repo state immediately before PH-03A begins. Used for drift detection and rollback reference.

git_state.on_dirty_action: halt — commit or stash all changes before beginning Phase 3

artifact_root_baseline.note: Any file created outside these roots and outside declared work cell source dirs is a containment leak.

concurrency_groups.name: pattern_bootstrap
concurrency_groups.note: Bootstrap phases must run serially — PATTERN_INDEX.yaml has single-writer semantics.

concurrency_groups.name: module_refactoring
concurrency_groups.independence_condition: Phases are independent if and only if no two phases share a source file path (verified by GATE-CONFLICT-001).

concurrency_groups.name: routing_rules
concurrency_groups.note: Single routing_rules.json output; serial authoring avoids merge conflicts.

policies: No two concurrent steps may modify the same file path.
PH-03A must reach completed before PH-03B, PH-03C, or PH-03D may start.
PH-04A must reach completed before PH-04B may start.
PH-03B, PH-03C, and PH-03D may run in parallel once PH-03A is complete, subject to GATE-CONFLICT-001 passing.
All PH-03* phases must reach completed before PH-04A may start.

pattern_governance.bootstrap_note: PATTERN_INDEX.yaml does not exist at plan creation time. PH-03A creates it. No step in PH-03B/C/D or PH-04B may begin until GATE-CFG-001 through GATE-CFG-006 all pass.

workstream_decomposition_rules: Each phase (PH-03B, PH-03C, PH-03D) is a separate workstream corresponding to non-overlapping service directories.
A workstream may only touch source files listed in the context packets for its module group.
Workstreams execute in separate git worktrees with dedicated branches.
The routing_rules.json workstream (PH-04B) is independent of all PH-03 workstreams.
independence_criteria: No two workstreams modify the same file path.
Independence is verified by GATE-CONFLICT-001 before parallel execution begins.
If a file appears in two workstreams, the overlapping workstreams must serialize.

artifacts.note: Produced by Phase 1. Governs all split specs and routing rule derivation.
Produced by Phase 2. Governs allowed_files per work cell split.

artifact_intent_manifest.description: Pre-execution declaration of all files to be created, modified, or removed in Phases 3 and 4.

records.purpose: Master pattern registry. Lists PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT, PAT-IMPORT-UPDATE, PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY.
Pattern package for splitting a dense service module into work-cell-scoped files.
Pattern package for updating module imports after a work cell split.
Pattern package for verifying a refactored work cell against its context packet and running tests.
Calendar-ingestor service refactored into D2/D3/F2/D4 work-cell-scoped module structure.
Transport-router service refactored into B1/B2 work-cell-scoped module structure.
Execution-engine service refactored into B2/B3 work-cell-scoped module structure.
Risk-manager service refactored into R1-R9 work-cell-scoped module structure.
Reentry-engine service refactored into E1-E4 work-cell-scoped module structure.
GUI-gateway service refactored into UI screen and gateway work-cell-scoped module structure.
Pattern package for authoring routing rule entries from catalog keyword mappings.
AI context routing rules: maps task keywords/archetypes to work cell IDs and context packet paths.
JSON Schema governing the structure of routing_rules.json.

rollback_plan.global_procedure_note: Restores all source files to the pre-Phase-3 baseline commit. Evidence artifacts under .state/ are not restored — they are diagnostic.

PH-03A.procedure: rm -f PATTERN_INDEX.yaml && rm -rf .state/patterns/ && git restore PATTERN_INDEX.yaml 2>/dev/null || true
PH-03A.note: PATTERN_INDEX.yaml does not exist before PH-03A; safe to remove.

PH-03B.procedure: git worktree remove .worktrees/PH-03B --force && git branch -D wt/PH-03B && git checkout origin/main -- services/calendar-ingestor/
PH-03B.note: Worktree removal discards all PH-03B changes. Source is restored from main.

PH-03C.procedure: git worktree remove .worktrees/PH-03C --force && git branch -D wt/PH-03C && git checkout origin/main -- services/transport-router/ services/execution-engine/

PH-03D.procedure: git worktree remove .worktrees/PH-03D --force && git branch -D wt/PH-03D && git checkout origin/main -- services/risk-manager/ services/reentry-engine/ services/gui-gateway/

PH-04A.note: Pattern package and schema not yet committed.

PH-04B.procedure: git worktree remove .worktrees/PH-04B --force && git branch -D wt/PH-04B && rm -f routing_rules.json
PH-04B.note: Routing rules not yet merged to main.

failure_mode_to_recovery_mapping.recovery: Remove worktree for affected phase; restore from main; review split_spec.yaml and context packet allowed_files before retrying.
Revert import changes in worktree; redesign work cell boundaries to eliminate the cycle; update context packet forbidden_dependencies before retrying.
Correct the failing pattern package fields; re-run GATE-CFG-001 through GATE-CFG-006 before any implementation step.
halt_and_rollback immediately; investigate how the write reached a protected path; add a file_scope check to the offending step.
Return to PH-04B authoring step; add catalog entry to submodule_context_catalog.json via a Phase 1 amendment before routing rule can be authored.
Remove the contaminated worktree; verify independence via GATE-CONFLICT-001 before re-creating worktree.
Do not proceed with refactoring. Return to PH-03A and correct the failing pattern or executor registration.

canonicalization_contract.note: All generated JSON and YAML artifacts must be canonicalized before hash comparison and before writing to .state/evidence/.

merge_policy.command_template: git checkout main && git merge --squash {branch_name} && git commit -m '[{phase_id}] {summary}'
manual_review_triggers: protected_path_request (any worktree touches a protected path — should trigger halt, not merge)
service_boundary_change (any __init__.py or module entry point renamed or moved)

rules: Each worktree writes ONLY inside its declared source directory scope.
Shared artifacts (.state/) are written only by the orchestrator after merge.
No direct commits to main; all changes merge via squash.
Each worktree must pass GATE-SPLIT-VERIFY-001 and GATE-TEST-001 before merge.
Step-level file scopes are enforced within each worktree.

lifecycle.merge: git checkout main && git merge --squash wt/{phase_id} && git commit -m '[{phase_id}] refactor {module_group}'
lifecycle.cleanup_on_success: git worktree remove .worktrees/{phase_id} && git branch -D wt/{phase_id}

STEP-001.purpose: Create PATTERN_INDEX.yaml and bootstrap the .state/patterns/ directory. This is a PATTERN_CREATION step — no pattern exists for this operation, which is the sole exception to the pattern-first law.
STEP-001.pattern_creation_exception_reason: Creating the pattern registry itself cannot be governed by a pattern that does not yet exist. This is the one-time bootstrapping exception. All subsequent steps must be pattern-bound.

inputs.description: Git commit hash captured at execution_baseline time

content_requirements: Lists stub entries for: PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT, PAT-IMPORT-UPDATE, PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY
Each entry includes: pattern_id, version, status (pending_validation), spec_file, config_schema_file, parameter_schema_file, executor_id
Valid YAML

invariants: Protected paths (other than creating PATTERN_INDEX.yaml) are not touched.
preconditions: GATE-NOOVERRIDE-001 from Phase 2 is on record.
postconditions: PATTERN_INDEX.yaml exists and is valid YAML.

failure_modes.remediation: Correct and re-run. No subsequent step may proceed.

failure_modes.meaning: Git working tree is not clean.
failure_modes.remediation: Commit or stash changes before beginning.

idempotency.enforcement: Re-running recreates the index from scratch; pattern package dirs are recreated.

STEP-002.purpose: Author and validate PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT pattern package. Defines how a dense service module is split into work-cell-scoped files using a split_spec.yaml config.
STEP-002.pattern_creation_exception_reason: This step creates PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT; it cannot itself be governed by that pattern.

content_requirements: Defines: input contract (source_dir, work_cell_id, context_packet_path, split_spec_file)
Defines: output contract (list of created/modified files, import_map.json)
Defines: guardrails (max_files_touched, forbidden_paths, allowed_extension_slots)
Defines: determinism requirements (split_spec_file is sole behavioral input)
Defines: test fixture path (.state/patterns/PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT/test_fixture/)
Validates split_spec.yaml fields: work_cell_id (required), source_files_to_extract (array), target_module_path (required), preserve_public_api (boolean)
Contains a minimal example service directory and expected output after split
passed: true
golden_test_fixture: passed

invariants: No source files in services/ modified.
PATTERN_INDEX.yaml updated to set PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT status to validated.

failure_modes.remediation: Correct spec.yaml or test fixture. Pattern must not be registered until golden test passes.

failure_modes.meaning: spec.yaml does not define forbidden_paths or max_files_touched guardrails.
failure_modes.remediation: Add guardrails. GATE-CFG-002 requires all behavior to be externally specified.

STEP-003.purpose: Author and validate PAT-IMPORT-UPDATE pattern package. Updates Python import statements after a work cell split using an import_map.json config.

content_requirements: Input contract: import_map.json (maps old import paths to new work-cell-scoped paths)
Output contract: list of modified files with before/after import diffs
Guardrail: only import statements may change — no logic modifications allowed
Guardrail: import_map.json must be generated by PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT, never hand-authored
passed: true

invariants: import_map.json consumed by this pattern must be produced by PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT, not hand-authored.

failure_modes.meaning: Pattern spec allows modifications beyond import statements.
failure_modes.remediation: Tighten guardrails to restrict to import-only changes.

STEP-004.purpose: Author and validate PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY pattern package. Runs context-packet compliance check and test suite for a refactored work cell.

content_requirements: Input: work_cell_id, context_packet_path, source_dir
Checks: (1) all files in source_dir are in context_packet allowed_files list; (2) no file in source_dir is in forbidden_files list; (3) pytest passes for work-cell-scoped tests
Output: verification_report.json with pass/fail per check
Guardrail: no source modifications — read-only verification
passed: true

invariants: Read-only pattern — must never modify source files.
postconditions: All three pattern packages present. GATE-CFG-001 through GATE-CFG-006 now runnable.

failure_modes.meaning: Pattern spec allows writes to source files.
failure_modes.remediation: Set all output contracts to read-only. Verification must never mutate.

STEP-001.purpose: Create worktree for calendar-ingestor refactoring and author split_spec.yaml files for D2, D3, F2, D4 work cells by reading their context packets.

content_requirements: Each spec lists source_files_to_extract from calendar-ingestor per work cell
Each target_module_path matches context packet allowed_files

invariants: Split specs are config artifacts — no source files modified in this step.
preconditions: GATE-CONFLICT-001 passed confirming PH-03B/C/D have no file path overlap.
postconditions: Each spec validated against PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT config_schema.json.

runtime_limits.note: Step 1 authors config only; source files touched = 0.

failure_modes.meaning: A split_spec.yaml fails PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT config_schema.json validation.
failure_modes.remediation: Correct the spec. Do not proceed to STEP-002 until all 4 specs validate.

rollback_strategy.note: No source mutations yet; trivial rollback.

STEP-002.purpose: Execute PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT against calendar-ingestor source using each split spec. Produces work-cell-scoped module files and import_map.json.
STEP-002.manual_review_reason: Source mutations to a production service. Human must review diff before merge.

content_requirements: Work-cell-scoped submodule directories created per split spec
Original monolithic files preserved or moved per spec

preconditions: STEP-001 completed. All 4 split specs validated.

failure_modes.meaning: Executor wrote files outside calendar-ingestor directory.
failure_modes.remediation: halt_and_rollback. Investigate executor file_scope enforcement. EXEC-WORKCELL-SPLITTER has write_outside_file_scope forbidden.

failure_modes.meaning: Public API of calendar-ingestor changed unexpectedly.
failure_modes.remediation: Review split spec preserve_public_api flag. Rollback and revise spec.

idempotency.enforcement: Backup before_hashes enable detection of re-run drift.

STEP-003.purpose: Execute PAT-IMPORT-UPDATE to fix import statements in calendar-ingestor using the import_map.json produced in STEP-002.

content_requirements: All import statements updated to new work-cell-scoped paths
No logic changes outside import lines

invariants: Only import statements changed — no business logic altered.
postconditions: All old import paths in import_map.json are replaced.

failure_modes.meaning: Import fixer modified logic beyond import statements.
failure_modes.remediation: Rollback. Investigate import_fixer executor. Review diff before any retry.

commands: # Then re-run STEP-002 split before retrying STEP-003

STEP-004.purpose: Execute PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY for each D2/D3/F2/D4 work cell. Confirm all files comply with context packets and all tests pass.

content_requirements: Per-work-cell: file compliance check passed/failed
Per-work-cell: pytest exit code
Overall: passed true/false

failure_modes.meaning: A file in the refactored source is not in the context packet allowed_files.
failure_modes.remediation: Return to STEP-001 and revise the split_spec to align file placement with context packet allowed_files.
Diagnose: likely a missed import update or broken public API. Revise STEP-003 or STEP-002 accordingly.

commands: # Read-only step — no rollback needed; source rollback handled by STEP-002/003

PH-03C._note: Steps follow identical structure to PH-03B but target services/transport-router/ (B1) and services/execution-engine/ (B2, B3). Split specs authored from context_packets/B1_*/, context_packets/B2_*/, context_packets/B3_*/. All step contracts use the same PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT → PAT-IMPORT-UPDATE → PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY sequence. Worktree: .worktrees/PH-03C. Branch: wt/PH-03C.
PH-03C.step_contract_template: Same 4-step structure as PH-03B. STEP-001: author split specs from context packets. STEP-002: execute split. STEP-003: update imports. STEP-004: verify and test.
PH-03C.additional_constraint: B2 steps must list mt4_authoritative_reference_for_ai.json in required_reference_documents within their split specs, consistent with PH-01 catalog entries.

PH-03D._note: Steps follow identical structure to PH-03B but target services/risk-manager/ (R1-R9), services/reentry-engine/ (E1-E4), and services/gui-gateway/ (UI work cells). Worktree: .worktrees/PH-03D. Branch: wt/PH-03D.
PH-03D.step_contract_template: Same 4-step structure as PH-03B per service. Risk and reentry run serially within PH-03D. GUI-gateway runs after risk and reentry pass verification.
PH-03D.additional_constraint: R8_SIZING_ENGINE split spec must include a determinism verification gate in PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY config: same inputs must produce identical output on consecutive runs.

STEP-001.purpose: Author and validate PAT-ROUTING-RULE-AUTHOR pattern package. Defines how routing rule entries are generated from catalog work cells, with keyword derivation governed solely by submodule_context_catalog.json.
STEP-001.pattern_creation_exception_reason: This step creates PAT-ROUTING-RULE-AUTHOR. The pattern cannot govern its own creation.

content_requirements: Input contract: work_cell_id, keyword_list (derived from work cell purpose + required_reference_documents), context_packet_path
Output contract: one routing rule record with fields: rule_id, keywords (array), work_cell_id, context_packet_path, required_docs (array), forbidden_context (array)
Guardrail: all keywords must appear verbatim in the work cell's purpose or required_reference_documents — no invented keywords
Guardrail: EXEC-ROUTING-RULE-WRITER must not modify submodule_context_catalog.json
Determinism requirement: same catalog input produces identical routing rule output on consecutive runs
Validates routing_rules.json structure
Requires fields: rule_id (string), keywords (array, min 1), work_cell_id (string), context_packet_path (string), required_docs (array), forbidden_context (array)
Requires: work_cell_id must resolve in submodule_context_catalog.json (enforced at GATE-ROUTING-CATALOG-SYNC-001 time)
passed: true

preconditions: All PH-03 phases completed and merged to main.
PH-03 GATE-NOOVERRIDE-001 final pass on record.
postconditions: routing_rules_schema.json exists and passes JSON Schema meta-validation.

failure_modes.meaning: Pattern spec does not constrain keywords to catalog-backed terms.
failure_modes.remediation: Add guardrail: keywords must be drawn from work cell purpose text and required_reference_documents names only.

STEP-001.purpose: Create worktree for routing rule authoring. Generate routing rule entries for Calendar Pipeline work cells (D2, D3, F2, D4).

content_requirements: Contains rule entries for all D2.*, D3.*, F2.*, D4.* work cells
Each entry has: rule_id, keywords (calendar-domain terms), work_cell_id, context_packet_path, required_docs, forbidden_context
Calendar work cells: keywords include 'calendar', 'polling', 'normalization', 'trigger', 'event', 'impact', 'timezone', 'CAL5', 'CAL8' as applicable per work cell purpose
No keyword invented without catalog backing

postconditions: routing_rules.json partial file passes routing_rules_schema.json validation for written entries.

failure_modes.meaning: A routing rule keyword was invented without catalog backing.
failure_modes.remediation: GATE-ROUTING-CATALOG-SYNC-001 will catch this. Remove the invented keyword; only catalog-derived terms allowed.

STEP-002.purpose: Generate routing rule entries for MT4 Bridge (B1, B2, B3), EA-Side MQL4 (A, B_MQL4, D_MQL4) work cells.

content_requirements: Appends B1/B2/B3 rules with keywords: 'MT4', 'transport', 'CSV', 'OrderSend', 'broker', 'execution', 'feedback'
EA-side rules with keywords: 'MQL4', 'signal', 'bridge', 'EA', 'expert advisor'

postconditions: routing_rules.json passes schema for all entries written so far.

failure_modes.meaning: A new rule_id collides with an existing entry.
failure_modes.remediation: EXEC-ROUTING-RULE-WRITER must generate unique rule_ids. Correct and re-run.

idempotency.enforcement: Append-only; re-run would duplicate entries. Use a deduplicate pass if re-running.

STEP-003.purpose: Generate routing rule entries for Risk Engine (R1-R9), Signal Engine (S1-S7), Reentry Engine (E1-E4), and UI work cells.

content_requirements: All work cells from catalog have at least one routing rule entry
UI rules reference ui_catalog.json screen names exactly

postconditions: routing_rules.json passes routing_rules_schema.json for all entries.

failure_modes.meaning: One or more work cells have no routing rule.
failure_modes.remediation: GATE-ROUTING-COVERAGE-001 identifies gaps. Add missing rules before closing Phase 4.

STEP-004.purpose: Final routing rules validation: schema check, full coverage check, catalog sync check, then merge routing_rules.json to main.
STEP-004.manual_review_reason: Final routing rules require human sign-off before merge to main — they govern all future AI task routing.

content_requirements: schema_valid: true
coverage: {total_work_cells, covered_work_cells, gaps:[]}
catalog_sync: {orphan_rules:[], missing_work_cells:[]}
overall_passed: true
approved_by: human reviewer name/ID
timestamp: ISO-8601
notes: string

invariants: Read-only validation step plus final merge commit.
preconditions: Human reviewer available for merge approval.
postconditions: routing_rules.json merged to main via squash.

failure_modes.meaning: One or more catalog work cells have no routing rule.
failure_modes.remediation: Return to STEP-003 and author missing rules. Do not merge until coverage is complete.

idempotency.enforcement: Validation is idempotent. Merge is one-time.

validation_gates.purpose: Every executable step has pattern_id, executor_id, spec_file, config_schema_file declared.
validation_gates.failure_action: halt — do not begin any refactoring until all executable steps are pattern-bound

validation_gates.purpose: Behavior is supplied by external spec/config artifacts — not step prose or bespoke commands.
Reject bespoke commands where a registered pattern exists.
Reject executor_ids not present in executor_registry.
Pattern creation steps (PH-03A) must complete before any implementation steps begin.
All patterns in PATTERN_INDEX.yaml have golden test fixtures that pass.
PATTERN_INDEX.yaml exists and is valid YAML with at least the required stub entries.
validation_gates.command: python -c "import yaml, sys; y=yaml.safe_load(open('PATTERN_INDEX.yaml')); pids={p['pattern_id'] for p in y['patterns']}; required={'PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT','PAT-IMPORT-UPDATE','PAT-WORKCELL-VERIFY'}; missing=required-pids; print(missing); sys.exit(1 if missing else 0)"

validation_gates.purpose: Each pattern's golden test fixture passes before the pattern is registered as validated.
Verify PH-03B, PH-03C, PH-03D have no overlapping file paths before parallel execution begins.
validation_gates.command: python scripts/check_workstream_independence.py --phases PH-03B PH-03C PH-03D --catalog submodule_context_catalog.json --mapping file_module_mapping.csv
validation_gates.failure_action: Serialize the conflicting phases; do not run them in parallel.

validation_gates.phase_step_key: PH-03B/STEP-002, PH-03B/STEP-003, PH-03C equivalents, PH-03D equivalents
validation_gates.purpose: All files in refactored work cell source dir are in the context packet allowed_files list; no file in forbidden_files list.
pytest passes for all tests in the refactored work cell scope.
No AUTHORITATIVE or CONSTRAINING context artifact was modified during execution.
validation_gates.command: python scripts/validate_nooverride.py --baseline .state/baseline/commit_hash.txt --protected module_catalog.json process_step_catalog.json communication_channels.json ui_catalog.json mt4_authoritative_reference_for_ai.json file_module_mapping.csv submodule_context_catalog.json context_packets/
validation_gates.failure_action: HALT. Restore from baseline. Investigate source of violation.

validation_gates.purpose: routing_rules.json is valid JSON and passes routing_rules_schema.json for all entries.
Every work cell in submodule_context_catalog.json has at least one routing rule in routing_rules.json.
validation_gates.command: python -c "import json, sys; rules=json.load(open('.worktrees/PH-04B/routing_rules.json')); cat=json.load(open('submodule_context_catalog.json')); covered={r['work_cell_id'] for r in rules['rules']}; all_cells={c['work_cell_id'] for c in cat['work_cells']}; gaps=all_cells-covered; print('GAPS:', gaps); sys.exit(1 if gaps else 0)"
validation_gates.failure_action: Author missing rules in PH-04B/STEP-003 before closing.

validation_gates.purpose: Every work_cell_id in routing_rules.json resolves in submodule_context_catalog.json. No orphan rules.
validation_gates.command: python -c "import json, sys; rules=json.load(open('.worktrees/PH-04B/routing_rules.json')); cat=json.load(open('submodule_context_catalog.json')); all_cells={c['work_cell_id'] for c in cat['work_cells']}; orphans=[r['rule_id'] for r in rules['rules'] if r['work_cell_id'] not in all_cells]; print('ORPHANS:', orphans); sys.exit(1 if orphans else 0)"
validation_gates.failure_action: Remove orphan rules or add missing work cells to catalog via Phase 1 amendment.

triggers.name: patternless_execution
triggers.description: An implementation step executes without a bound pattern_id.

triggers.name: unregistered_executor_invocation
triggers.description: A step invokes an executor_id not in executor_registry.

triggers.name: freehand_script_created_where_pattern_exists
triggers.description: A bespoke script is created for file splitting instead of using PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT.
triggers.action: halt — delete bespoke script; use PAT-WORKCELL-SPLIT

triggers.name: worktree_contamination
triggers.description: A PH-03B worktree step writes to PH-03C or PH-03D directories.

triggers.name: protected_path_modification
triggers.description: A step modifies a file in protected_paths.

triggers.name: split_without_context_packet_backing
triggers.description: A source file is split into a path not declared in the work cell's context packet allowed_files.
triggers.action: halt — revise split_spec to align with context packet

triggers.name: implementation_before_pattern_validation
triggers.description: A PH-03B/C/D step begins before PH-03A patterns are all in validated status.

triggers.name: routing_keyword_invented
triggers.description: A routing rule keyword was not derived from the catalog work cell purpose or required_reference_documents.
triggers.action: halt — remove invented keyword; source only from catalog

triggers.name: routing_rule_modifies_catalog
triggers.action: halt — catalog is protected; add to catalog via Phase 1 amendment

triggers.name: routing_coverage_gap_ignored
triggers.description: Phase 4 is closed with GATE-ROUTING-COVERAGE-001 showing uncovered work cells.
triggers.action: halt — author missing rules before merge

triggers.name: undeclared_file_mutation
triggers.description: A file is created or modified not declared in artifact_intent_manifest.
triggers.action: halt — add to manifest or delete undeclared file

triggers.name: runtime_behavior_override
triggers.description: Step behavior is altered at runtime via prompt or inline logic outside approved extension slots.
triggers.action: halt — behavior must come from spec/config/schema only

actions.critical: halt — do not proceed to next step or phase
